---
name: 'bmad-bmm-edit-prd'
description: 'Edit an existing PRD'
---

In all BMAD resource files, the template variable {bmad-path} resolves to: c:\Users\mohsho\.vscode\extensions\mohamed-sayed.bmad-studio-1.0.0\resources\_bmad
The template variable {project-root} refers to the workspace/project root directory.

IT IS CRITICAL THAT YOU FOLLOW THIS COMMAND: LOAD the FULL c:\Users\mohsho\.vscode\extensions\mohamed-sayed.bmad-studio-1.0.0\resources\_bmad/bmm/workflows/2-plan-workflows/create-prd/workflow-edit-prd.md, READ its entire contents and follow its directions exactly!
